race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines Hcp (Bm78)
race.comment: FORMAL (9) fourth-up for this and gets in light with Nock's claim from the low draw. Worked hard early from the wide gate and that effort told in the straight when fourth over 1200m at Canterbury. Has more options here and gets his chance at each-way odds. CENTURY SONG (10) had mixed fortunes in his two runs back and deserves his chance here. Snagged back to last from the wide gate with a respectable tenth to Ice Kool over 1000m at Randwick. Desperate for the trip and can race closer to the speed here. Genuine contender. SHROPSHIRE LAD (3) genuine gelding who saves his best for this track and trip. Had no luck two back, then launched late to get the job done over 1100m here. Can win again. ALEPPO PINE (8) caught the first-up for the new yard with a fast-finishing sixth over 1000m at Randwick. Proven second-up and has top four prospects. POLYGLOT (5) has ability and best form is usually early in the prep. Maps well and can bounce back quickly.
